description: iOS social gathering app that notifies users of weekly curated local venues and lets them RSVP

in: iOS app (React Native or native Swift)
Sign in with Apple and Google

personas.name: Maya Okafor

demographics.experience: Heavy smartphone user, 3 years in Seattle

goals: Discover new local spots without spending time researching
Meet up with existing friends at a pre-agreed place
RSVP quickly while on the bus or between meetings

context.environment: On the go: transit, coffee shops, lunch breaks
constraints: Checks phone in short windows (< 2 min)

painPoints: Group chats go silent after 'where should we go?' messages
Too many options leads to decision fatigue
Hard to know if friends are actually attending

capabilities.domainKnowledge: Familiar with Yelp, Google Maps, Instagram
capabilities.cognitiveLoad: High during commute — wants zero friction

topTasks.description: Open app and immediately see this week's venue
Tap Yes / Maybe / Nope in under 5 seconds

personas.quote: Just tell me where we're going — I'll be there.

personas.name: James Whitfield
goals: Find genuine local spots rather than tourist traps
Connect with locals or other travelers in a new city
Understand the vibe of a venue before going

constraints: Might be in a different time zone

painPoints: Generic travel guides don't surface community-endorsed spots
Hard to tell if a venue is lively on a given night
Doesn't know anyone in the city to co-ordinate with

capabilities.cognitiveLoad: Medium — has time to explore app

topTasks.description: Choose the city he is currently in
Read hours, address, rating before deciding to go
Browse past spots to understand the curation quality
topTasks.frequency: first session in a new city

personas.quote: Show me where the locals actually go, not the tourist version.

personas.name: Priya Nair

demographics.experience: Moderate smartphone user; used similar apps briefly

goals: Build a social routine in a new city
Discover the neighborhood without endless Googling
Feel less alone during the first months

constraints: No established friend group locally yet
Anxiety about going to new places alone

painPoints: Overwhelmed by choice when exploring a new city
Social plans fall through because coordination is hard
Doesn't know if a place is safe or welcoming

capabilities.domainKnowledge: Has used Meetup, Bumble BFF; familiar with RSVP concepts
capabilities.cognitiveLoad: Medium — willing to learn the app's rhythm

topTasks.description: Sign in and pick her city on first launch
Read address, rating, and hours to feel confident before going
Mark Maybe so she keeps the option open

personas.quote: I just want somewhere to show up where I know at least a few people might be.

journeys.title: View Weekly Spot and RSVP
journeys.scenario: Maya receives a Thursday push notification about this week's Seattle spot. She taps it while on the bus, lands on the home feed, reads the venue card, and taps Yes.
successCriteria: Lands on Home Feed within 2 seconds of tapping notification
Venue name and address visible without scrolling

steps.action: Receive push notification: 'This week's Seattle spot: The Mayflower'
steps.expected: Notification appears on lock screen with venue name
issues: Notification may be missed if Do Not Disturb is on

steps.expected: App opens cold or warm to Home Feed, venue card scrolled into view
Hero image prominent, name bold, address visible
Button toggles to selected (green), count increments, haptic feedback

journeys.title: First Launch — Sign In and City Selection
journeys.scenario: Priya downloads Covey after a colleague mentions it. She opens the app, signs in with Apple, and picks Seattle as her city before landing on the Home Feed.
successCriteria: City selected within 10 seconds of seeing the list
Home Feed visible immediately after city selection
No confusing steps or required profile fields

steps.action: Open Covey for the first time
steps.expected: Sign-In screen with logo, tagline, Apple and Google buttons
Native Apple auth sheet appears; user approves
steps.touchpoint: iOS Sign In with Apple sheet

steps.expected: Seattle card highlights, confirm button activates
Transitions to Home Feed showing this week's spot
issues: If no spot yet (pre-Thursday), show empty state
